Footer.tagline: Short-term rental property management in Bansko and Burgas.

Hero.title: Property management in <highlight>Bansko and Burgas</highlight>.
Hero.lead: Home2Host takes care of every part of running your short-term rental — from professional listings and guest communication to cleaning and maintenance. You earn the income; we handle the rest.
Hero.imageAlt: Bright living room with panoramic windows, a wooden ceiling, and a pool behind the glass doors

About.heading: Who we are
About.paragraph1: Home2Host is a company built to deliver professional management of short-term rental properties. Renting out properties on Airbnb, Booking, and similar platforms keeps getting more popular — it lets owners earn extra income from their home while still being able to use it when they need to.
About.paragraph2: But it takes time and effort: cleaning, guest communication, check-ins, pricing decisions. Home2Host takes all of that off your plate and runs the whole operation for you, with a focus on optimising occupancy and maximising your revenue.
About.metaDescription: Home2Host is a company offering professional management of short-term rental properties in Bansko and Burgas.

Services.heading: What we do for you
Services.lead: End-to-end management of your short-term rental — from the listing to welcoming the guests.
Services.closing: We take care of the guests, you enjoy the rest.

items.title: Professional listing setup
items.body: We build and maintain your property's listing so it stands out from the competition. We pay attention to every detail — from the copy to the amenity layout — to attract more bookings. We use curated professional photography that visually highlights what makes your place special.
items.imageAlt: A stylish wall arrangement with wooden cubbies and plants

items.title: Dynamic pricing
items.body: We build an intelligent pricing strategy that adapts to real market conditions. Our algorithm tracks trends, seasonal shifts, and local events to recommend the right price and stay terms. The result: higher occupancy and more revenue across Airbnb, Booking, and other platforms.
items.imageAlt: A calculator, banknotes, and coins on a working budget sheet

items.title: Communication and check-in
items.body: We handle all guest communication — before, during, and after the stay — with fast replies, a personal touch, and a great impression every time. We check guests in at a time that works for them and hand them a personalised guide with attractions, restaurants, and useful contacts.
items.imageAlt: Two hands carefully holding a wooden house model

items.title: Maintenance and cleaning
items.body: Your property always looks its best. After every stay we provide freshly laundered linens and towels, restocked supplies, and immaculate cleaning. If something breaks we have a reliable team of technicians who respond quickly and effectively.
items.imageAlt: A housekeeper arranging pillows on a freshly made bed

items.title: Interior design
items.body: Our designer makes sure your property feels not just tidy but inviting and warm. Through a refresh of the paint, considered decoration, and carefully chosen details, the space becomes a genuine little gem — and the small touches add up to a bigger picture, and higher revenue.
items.imageAlt: Fabric, wood, and colour-palette samples on a working table

items.title: Security
items.body: We screen guests carefully and work only with verified profiles and high-rated travellers. The check-in process gives you peace of mind and them genuine comfort — because safety is the key to a trouble-free stay and more 5-star reviews.
items.imageAlt: A peaceful sofa with Scandinavian pillows and a vase of flowers

Services.metaDescription: End-to-end short-term rental management — professional listings, dynamic pricing, guest communication, cleaning, maintenance, and security.

Prices.heading: Pick the plan that fits you
Prices.lead: Three different offers for different needs — from a one-off launch to full management to an interior refresh.

plans.name: Start Smart
features: Listing setup on Airbnb and Booking.com

plans.name: Full Care
features: End-to-end property management, top to bottom
Dynamic pricing strategy by demand, day, and events
Fresh linens, towels, and supplies for every guest
Self check-in and guest communication in Bulgarian, English, German, and Russian

plans.name: Home Refresh
plans.cadence: Custom quote based on the property's needs
features: Decoration and interior refresh after an on-site visit
Selection and styling of decorative pieces (pillows, vases, accents, and more)

Prices.metaDescription: Three plans for short-term rental management — Start Smart to launch, Full Care for full management, and Home Refresh for an interior refresh.
